---
title: "PTvsFT"
author: "Kanaan Law"
date: "2026-04-28"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---




```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Load required packages
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(tsibble)
library(feasts)
library(fable)
```




```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}


# Choose file interactively
file_path <- file.choose()

# Load data
df <- read_csv(file_path)

# Reshape wide → long
df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -ID,
    names_to = c("Year", "Type"),
    names_sep = "_",
    values_to = "Retention"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Year = as.integer(Year),
    Type = factor(Type)
  )

# Aggregate BEFORE converting to tsibble
df_yearly <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Year, Type) %>%
  summarise(AvgRetention = mean(Retention, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Now convert to tsibble (no errors)
df_yearly_ts <- df_yearly %>%
  as_tsibble(index = Year, key = Type)

# Quick plot
df_yearly_ts %>%
  autoplot(AvgRetention)

# Example ARIMA model
fit <- df_yearly_ts %>%
  model(ARIMA(AvgRetention))

report(fit)


```

```{r warning=FALSE}
# FULL-TIME RETENTION TIME SERIES
df_yearly_ts %>%
  filter(Type == "FT") %>%
  autoplot(AvgRetention) +
  labs(
    title = "Full-Time Retention Rates Over Time",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Average Retention (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```




```{r}
# PART-TIME RETENTION TIME SERIES
df_yearly_ts %>%
  filter(Type == "PT") %>%
  autoplot(AvgRetention) +
  labs(
    title = "Part-Time Retention Rates Over Time",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Average Retention (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```





```{r warning=FALSE}
df_yearly_ts %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = AvgRetention, color = Type)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  labs(
    title = "Full-Time vs Part-Time Retention Rates Over Time",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Average Retention (%)",
    color = "Enrollment Type"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FT" = "blue", "PT" = "red")) +
  theme_minimal()

```


```{r warning=FALSE}
# DIFFERENCED FULL-TIME SERIES
df_yearly_ts %>%
  filter(Type == "FT") %>%
  mutate(Diff = difference(AvgRetention)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Diff)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue", size = 1.1) +
  labs(
    title = "Differenced Full-Time Retention Series",
    x = "Year",
    y = "First Difference of Avg Retention"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```


```{r warning=FALSE}
# DIFFERENCED PART-TIME SERIES
df_yearly_ts %>%
  filter(Type == "PT") %>%
  mutate(Diff = difference(AvgRetention)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Diff)) +
  geom_line(color = "red", size = 1.1) +
  labs(
    title = "Differenced Part-Time Retention Series",
    x = "Year",
    y = "First Difference of Avg Retention"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```



```{r warning=FALSE}
# DIFFERENCED FULL-TIME SERIES
ft_diff <- df_yearly_ts %>%
  filter(Type == "FT") %>%
  mutate(Diff = difference(AvgRetention))

# ACF
ft_diff %>%
  ACF(Diff) %>%
  autoplot() +
  labs(
    title = "ACF of Differenced Full-Time Retention",
    x = "Lag",
    y = "ACF"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# PACF
ft_diff %>%
  PACF(Diff) %>%
  autoplot() +
  labs(
    title = "PACF of Differenced Full-Time Retention",
    x = "Lag",
    y = "PACF"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```


```{r warning=FALSE}
# DIFFERENCED PART-TIME SERIES
pt_diff <- df_yearly_ts %>%
  filter(Type == "PT") %>%
  mutate(Diff = difference(AvgRetention))

# ACF
pt_diff %>%
  ACF(Diff) %>%
  autoplot() +
  labs(
    title = "ACF of Differenced Part-Time Retention",
    x = "Lag",
    y = "ACF"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# PACF
pt_diff %>%
  PACF(Diff) %>%
  autoplot() +
  labs(
    title = "PACF of Differenced Part-Time Retention",
    x = "Lag",
    y = "PACF"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```


```{r warning=FALSE}
# FT model
fit_ft <- df_yearly_ts %>%
  filter(Type == "FT") %>%
  model(ARIMA(AvgRetention))

report(fit_ft)
```


```{r warning=FALSE}
# PT model
fit_pt <- df_yearly_ts %>%
  filter(Type == "PT") %>%
  model(ARIMA(AvgRetention))

report(fit_pt)

```





```{r warning=FALSE}
# FT forecast
fc_ft <- fit_ft %>%
  forecast(h = 5)

# PT forecast
fc_pt <- fit_pt %>%
  forecast(h = 5)

```



```{r warning=FALSE}
# FT model
fit_ft <- df_yearly_ts %>%
  filter(Type == "FT") %>%
  model(ARIMA(AvgRetention))

# FT forecast
fc_ft <- fit_ft %>%
  forecast(h = 5)

# FT forecast plot
fc_ft %>%
  autoplot(df_yearly_ts %>% filter(Type == "FT")) +
  labs(
    title = "Full-Time Retention Forecast",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Average Retention (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


```




```{r warning=FALSE}
# PT model
fit_pt <- df_yearly_ts %>%
  filter(Type == "PT") %>%
  model(ARIMA(AvgRetention))

# PT forecast
fc_pt <- fit_pt %>%
  forecast(h = 5)

# PT forecast plot
fc_pt %>%
  autoplot(df_yearly_ts %>% filter(Type == "PT")) +
  labs(
    title = "Part-Time Retention Forecast",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Average Retention (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


```





```{r warning=FALSE}
library(fabletools)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```




```{r warning=FALSE}
gg_tsresiduals(fit_ft)
gg_tsresiduals(fit_pt)

```





```{r}
yearly_wide <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Year, Type) %>%
  summarise(mean_retention = mean(Retention, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(Type = ifelse(Type == "FT", "FullTime", "PartTime")) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Type,
    values_from = mean_retention
  ) %>%
  arrange(Year)

yearly_wide
```



Create time‑series objects
```{r}
library(forecast)

start_year <- min(yearly_wide$Year)
end_year   <- max(yearly_wide$Year)

ft_ts <- ts(yearly_wide$FullTime, start = start_year, end = end_year, frequency = 1)
pt_ts <- ts(yearly_wide$PartTime, start = start_year, end = end_year, frequency = 1)

```

```{r}
par(mfrow = c(2,1))
plot(ft_ts, main = "Full-Time Retention", ylab = "Retention (%)", xlab = "Year")
plot(pt_ts, main = "Part-Time Retention", ylab = "Retention (%)", xlab = "Year")
par(mfrow = c(1,1))
```


Plot the two series

```{r}
library(tseries)

par(mfrow = c(2,2))
Acf(ft_ts, main = "ACF FT")
Pacf(ft_ts, main = "PACF FT")
Acf(pt_ts, main = "ACF PT")
Pacf(pt_ts, main = "PACF PT")
par(mfrow = c(1,1))

adf_ft <- adf.test(ft_ts)
adf_pt <- adf.test(pt_ts)

adf_ft
adf_pt

```




Stationarity + ACF/PACF
```{r warning=FALSE}
fit_ft <- auto.arima(ft_ts)
fit_pt <- auto.arima(pt_ts)

summary(fit_ft)
summary(fit_pt)

AIC(fit_ft, fit_pt)
BIC(fit_ft, fit_pt)

checkresiduals(fit_ft)
checkresiduals(fit_pt)

```





ARIMA model comparison
```{r}
lm_ft <- lm(FullTime ~ Year, data = yearly_wide)
lm_pt <- lm(PartTime ~ Year, data = yearly_wide)

summary(lm_ft)
summary(lm_pt)

```



Linear trend comparison
```{r}
lm_ft <- lm(FullTime ~ Year, data = yearly_wide)
lm_pt <- lm(PartTime ~ Year, data = yearly_wide)

summary(lm_ft)
summary(lm_pt)

```

Var model



```{r warning=FALSE}

library(vars)

both_ts <- cbind(
  FullTime  = ft_ts,
  PartTime  = pt_ts
)

lagselect <- VARselect(both_ts, lag.max = 5, type = "const")
lagselect


p_chosen <- lagselect$selection["AIC(n)"]


```




```{r}
var_fit <- VAR(both_ts, p = p_chosen, type = "const")
summary(var_fit)

```


```{r}
serial_test <- serial.test(var_fit, lags.pt = 5, type = "PT.asymptotic")
serial_test

```

```{r}
# Forecast next 5 years
fc_ft <- forecast(fit_ft, h = 5)
fc_pt <- forecast(fit_pt, h = 5)

autoplot(fc_ft) + ggtitle("Forecast: Full-Time Retention")
autoplot(fc_pt) + ggtitle("Forecast: Part-Time Retention")

```




ETS section:

```{r}
ets_ft <- ets(ft_ts)
ets_pt <- ets(pt_ts)

summary(ets_ft)
summary(ets_pt)
```
```{r}
train_ft <- window(ft_ts, start = c(2003, 1), end = c(2017, 1))
test_ft  <- window(ft_ts, start = c(2018, 1), end = c(2024, 1))

train_pt <- window(pt_ts, start = c(2003, 1), end = c(2017, 1))
test_pt  <- window(pt_ts, start = c(2018, 1), end = c(2024, 1))


ets_ft <- ets(train_ft)
ets_pt <- ets(train_pt)

ets_ft_fc <- forecast(ets_ft, h = length(test_ft))
ets_pt_fc <- forecast(ets_pt, h = length(test_pt))




```


```{r}
accuracy(ets_ft_fc, test_ft)
accuracy(ets_pt_fc, test_pt)



```
